description: Style Note Featuring your little boy's favourite cartoon character- Spider-Man this pair of sandals from marvel will be an instant hit. With a grippy outsole and footbed, these sandals offer unparalleled comfort to your little one's feet. Pair it with a cotton tee and shorts for a hot summer day. Product Details Navy blue sandals with Spider-Man printed patch on upper Red ankle straps with branding One piece foamy rubber upper and outsole Nubs on outsole with branding Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteFeaturing your little boy's favourite cartoon character- Spider-Man this pair of sandals from Marvel will be an instant hit.
